findings.location: s1 — 関連するハンドラ table
findings.description: RST cross-reference markup `:doc:`ThreadContextHandler`` is preserved verbatim in the markdown table cell. AI agents reading this will encounter raw RST syntax instead of a plain class/handler name.
findings.source_evidence: Source uses RST `:doc:\`ThreadContextHandler\`` as a navigation reference; the knowledge file should strip the `:doc:` wrapper and render just the handler name `ThreadContextHandler` in the markdown table.
